functions.name: ReparentCollection
functions.description: Re-parent the given collection.

functions.name: GetCollectionsContainingAssetPtr
functions.description: Get the collections in the specified container that contain the given asset.

functions.name: GetCollectionsContainingAssetData
functions.description: Get the collections in the specified container that contain the given asset.

functions.name: GetCollectionsContainingAsset
functions.description: Get the collections in the specified container that contain the given asset.

functions.name: GetCollectionsByName
functions.description: Gets the given collections in the given container (matching only by name).

functions.name: GetCollections
functions.description: Get all available collections in the specified container.

functions.name: GetCollectionContainers
functions.description: Gets all available collection containers.

functions.name: GetBaseGameCollectionContainer
functions.description: Get the collection container for the base game.

functions.name: GetAssetsInCollection
functions.description: Get the assets in the given collection.

functions.name: EmptyCollection
functions.description: Remove all assets from the given collection.

functions.name: DestroyCollection
functions.description: Destroy the given collection.

functions.name: CreateOrEmptyCollection
functions.description: Create a new collection with the given name and share type in the provided collection container if it doesn't already exist, or empty the existing collection if it does.

functions.name: CreateCollection
functions.description: Create a new collection with the given name and share type in the provided collection container.

functions.name: CollectionExists
functions.description: Check whether the given collection exists in the given container (matching both name and share type).
